featureFamilies.name: Public discovery and booking
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Nile Learn public catalog and booking records win; provider titles are never identity keys.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Show an explicit unavailable or validation state and do not fabricate a booking.

featureFamilies.name: Authentication and durable sessions
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Authenticated identity and live role grants must both validate; mismatch fails closed.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Reject login or session resolution without demo fallback in production.

featureFamilies.name: Legacy route compatibility redirects
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Compatibility routes redirect to a canonical role route and never own data.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Resolve to the role-safe destination or deny access.

featureFamilies.name: Role portal overviews
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Dashboard metrics are derived from authoritative family repositories and never written from the dashboard.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Show scoped unavailable states without substituting demo records.

featureFamilies.name: Nile Forms definitions, publications, assignments, and submissions
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Published versions are immutable; submission transitions use server commands and idempotency evidence.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Fail closed and preserve the draft or offline queue for an explicit retry.

featureFamilies.name: Typed branch incident and maintenance requests
featureFamilies.externalId: none; an immutable reviewed Nile Forms submission is the internal source evidence
featureFamilies.conflictRule: The typed request aggregate owns status, assignment, comments, resolution, and history; source form answers remain immutable evidence.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Deny stale, replay-conflicting, terminal, malformed, or out-of-scope commands atomically and preserve the prior request and source submission.

featureFamilies.name: Self profile and safe preferences
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Self-service may update safe fields only; role, branch, department, and permission scope remain admin-controlled.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Reject the complete command when any protected field or validation rule fails.

featureFamilies.name: Users, role grants, permissions, and staff scope
featureFamilies.conflictRule: The server resolves the actor and effective grants; only an active superadmin grant may act globally.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Deny the whole command on permission or scope mismatch.

featureFamilies.name: Branches, departments, and workspace settings
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Branch and department scope must match the live role grant; global mutation requires superadmin.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Reject cross-scope reads and writes and preserve the previous state.

featureFamilies.name: Admissions, placement, students, and enrollments
featureFamilies.externalId: legacy EMS identifier retained only as finite migration evidence
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Lifecycle transitions require exact branch, level, enrollment, course run, and class group targets.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Reject invalid transitions atomically; never choose a fallback class or teacher.

featureFamilies.name: Programs, levels, course catalog, and Nile-native curriculum governance
featureFamilies.externalId: Moodle course mapping is separate from Nile Learn course identity
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Nile Learn owns catalog and delivery metadata; Moodle content is never copied into writable curriculum fields.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Reject invalid status or curriculum transitions and retain the prior published version.

featureFamilies.name: Course runs, classes, rooms, sessions, and schedules
featureFamilies.externalId: Moodle course and group mappings are external mapping records only
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Writes require exact active course run, class group, teacher, branch, room, and schedule targets.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Reject conflicts or create an explicitly pending conflict state where the command contract allows it.

featureFamilies.name: Attendance and attendance exceptions
featureFamilies.externalId: optional future Moodle attendance activity mapping
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Class session and roster membership are authoritative; Moodle writeback remains disabled.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Reject out-of-scope sessions and preserve the last saved roster.

featureFamilies.name: Moodle-owned assignments, submissions, grading, and feedback
featureFamilies.externalId: exact Moodle delivery-course, assignment, user, submission, and grade mappings
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Moodle is the sole learning-record authority. Legacy Nile assignment actions reject normalized writes and later route through verified Moodle commands or launches.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Reject local mutation, stale or missing mappings, and unrelated-class access without changing projected state.

featureFamilies.name: Moodle-owned quizzes, attempts, question bank, and review
featureFamilies.externalId: exact Moodle delivery-course, quiz, question-bank, user, and attempt mappings
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Moodle is the sole quiz and question authority. Nile surfaces either verified projections or an authorized Moodle command or launch.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Reject local mutation, unsigned launches, stale mappings, and attempts outside the assigned class scope.

featureFamilies.name: Moodle-owned course content, resources, and learning progress
featureFamilies.externalId: exact Moodle delivery-course, section, module, resource, and completion mappings
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Moodle owns content and completion. Nile Learn owns only the mapped class, roster, timetable, and operational context.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Reject local mutation and unknown enrollment, mapping, or ownership while preserving the last verified projection as stale.

featureFamilies.name: Quran progress and recitation review
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Student ownership and assigned-teacher scope must both pass.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Reject unrelated learner or recitation changes and preserve the prior review.

featureFamilies.name: Internal messages and notifications
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Recipient resolution is server-scoped by role, class, department, or branch.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Deny the send or read mutation if any recipient is outside scope.

featureFamilies.name: Invoices and internal payment records
featureFamilies.externalId: future payment provider reference only after approval
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Payment records are append-only internal evidence and require branch or global finance scope.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Reject invalid invoice or scope and never report external settlement.

featureFamilies.name: Certificate approval, issue, and verification
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Eligibility, approval, and issue transitions are ordered and auditable.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Reject invalid transitions and preserve the current certificate state.

featureFamilies.name: Reports, saved views, audit, and system health
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Reports derive from authoritative repositories; audit events are immutable.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Show unavailable or stale-at timestamps; never substitute demo metrics.

featureFamilies.name: Student support cases
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Students may create and read their own support records; staff access is scoped.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Reject cross-student access and retain the existing case state.

featureFamilies.name: Platform configuration and integration operations
featureFamilies.externalId: provider configuration identifier with server-only credential reference
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Visual connected state requires current server evidence; credentials never enter browser state.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Remain visibly disconnected or unavailable and fail provider operations closed.

featureFamilies.name: Transactional email delivery workers and provider evidence
featureFamilies.externalId: Resend message and signed webhook identifiers linked to an internal outbox event
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Nile Learn workflow and in-app state remain authoritative; provider events update delivery evidence and suppressions only.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Fail closed, retain the outbox event for bounded retry or dead letter, and never mutate the originating workflow.

featureFamilies.name: Alpha platform state compatibility gateway
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Server action gates remain authoritative; this endpoint is not a production repository design.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Fail closed when server state is unavailable; never authorize from localStorage.

featureFamilies.name: Moodle site and user identity projection
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Unmatched or ambiguous users are quarantined; email and display name are not fallback identifiers.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Keep the prior projection visibly stale and open a reconciliation case.

featureFamilies.name: Moodle course structure, content, and activity definitions
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Provider IDs and hashes identify records; title matching is prohibited.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Retain the last successful projection as stale and expose reconciliation errors.

featureFamilies.name: Moodle enrollments, rosters, groups, and groupings
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Missing mappings are reconciliation cases; Nile Learn class membership is not silently overwritten.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Expose stale roster status and block dependent provider actions.

featureFamilies.name: Moodle activity and course completion
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Completion is keyed by mapped user, course, and activity IDs only.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Show the last successful completion timestamp and a stale marker.

featureFamilies.name: Moodle assignment result observations
featureFamilies.conflictRule: The normalized session and role grant resolve exact class, assignment, and user mappings. Students receive only their own learner result, teachers receive person-level results only for an exactly assigned class, and HOD/Super Admin receive aggregate counts. Registrar and Branch Admin are denied. Moodle-managed assignment records reject Nile Learn write commands.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Keep a retained observation visibly stale for no more than 30 days, never use stale data as authority, and prohibit local edit or grade overwrite. The read route performs no provider call.

featureFamilies.name: Moodle quiz attempts and review
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Attempt and review data are keyed by Moodle quiz and attempt IDs.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Keep prior projection stale and do not invent scores or attempt state.

featureFamilies.name: Moodle grades, feedback, H5P results, SCORM tracks, and lesson outcomes
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Provider-managed outcome fields are immutable in Nile Learn and keyed by provider IDs.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Retain the last successful value with source and stale timestamp; never substitute zero.

featureFamilies.name: Synthetic Moodle user write contract
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Only namespaced disposable fixtures are writable; cleanup and retired-token proof are mandatory.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Stop the campaign, reconcile the fixture, and clean it before any retry.

featureFamilies.name: Synthetic Moodle enrollment and group write contract
featureFamilies.externalId: synthetic sandbox enrollment and group ids
featureFamilies.conflictRule: Only namespaced disposable fixtures are writable; replay and cleanup must be idempotent.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Stop the campaign and complete reconciliation and cleanup before retry.

featureFamilies.name: Synthetic Moodle service status contract
featureFamilies.conflictRule: The response must match the approved sandbox fingerprint before writes run.
featureFamilies.failureBehavior: Abort all write tests when the sandbox fingerprint does not match.
